channel.title: Security notes from the lab on zx10r Security Notes
channel.description: Recent content in Security notes from the lab on zx10r Security Notes

item.title: Active Directory Lab Notes: Enumeration, Trust Paths, and Privilege Escalation
item.description: Notes from building and attacking an Active Directory lab, focused on domain enumeration, trust paths, and escalation patterns.

item.title: A Practical Web Exploitation Workflow for CTFs and Labs
item.description: A disciplined web testing workflow for mapping application behavior, finding logic flaws, and proving impact cleanly.

item.title: My First CTF: Enumeration Lessons That Made Exploitation Click
item.description: How my first rooted CTF target taught me to slow down, enumerate carefully, and turn small signals into a full attack path.

item.title: About zx10r Security Notes
item.description: A short overview of zx10r Security Notes and the kind of security work collected here.
